reasoning: As of late 2025 and early 2026, there are no FDA-approved vaccines for any fungal diseases, including Blastomycosis. Research is mainly in the preclinical phase (e.g., testing on mice). The probability of a vaccine being developed, clinically approved, and accurately updated on Wikipedia in the ~16-day window before resolution is essentially zero. A vandalism edit is possible but highly unlikely to persist or be the intended spirit of the resolution. Therefore, the probability is set to the lowest bound.
